home.heroTitle: Discover recipes for whatever's in your kitchen
home.heroSubtitle: Browse a curated catalog by category, find your next meal, and unlock AI-powered suggestions tailored to your pantry.
home.recipeOfDayDesc: A fresh pick every day to inspire your cooking.
home.explorerDesc: Add ingredients you already have at home and instantly see which recipes you can (almost) make — no account needed.
home.explorerPlaceholder: Type an ingredient and press Enter…
home.explorerHint: Tip: add a few staples like eggs, rice, or tomato.
home.explorerCta: Want quantity-aware matching, AI recipe ideas, and a saved pantry?
home.noResults: No recipes match your search or filters.
home.noFavorites: You haven't saved any favorites yet. Tap the heart on a recipe to save it.
home.dailyDesc: Hand-picked for you based on the ingredients in your pantry and the recipes you love.
home.dailyEmpty: Add ingredients to your pantry to get personalized daily picks.
home.footerCtaDesc: Create a free account to build your pantry, add ingredients, and get personalized AI recipe suggestions.

today.title: Today for you
today.subtitle: Fresh picks based on your pantry, taste profile, and what's about to expire.
today.empty: Add ingredients to your pantry to get personalized suggestions.

rescue.title_one: Use it up — {{count}} item expiring soon
rescue.title_other: Use it up — {{count}} items expiring soon
rescue.subtitle: Cook these before they spoil and cut down on food waste.
rescue.noMatches: Nothing in the catalog matches your expiring items right now — try adding more pantry staples.

common.configLoadFailed: Could not load application settings. Check that the API gateway is running.

dashboard.subtitle: Your BabaAI dashboard
dashboard.pantryDesc: Add and manage ingredients in your pantry. Search, filter by category, and track expiration dates.
dashboard.recipeSuggestionsDesc: Generate ranked recipe ideas from your pantry, see used and missing ingredients, and review suggestion history.

ingredients.title: My ingredients
ingredients.subtitle: Manage your pantry — search, filter, and keep track of expiration dates.
ingredients.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from your pantry? This action cannot be undone.
ingredients.bulkDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{count}} ingredient(s) from your pantry? This action cannot be undone.
ingredients.emptyDesc: Add your first ingredient to start building your pantry.
ingredients.emptyFilteredDesc: Try adjusting search or category filters.
ingredients.name: Name
ingredients.categoryOnEdit: — updated from the ingredient name on save
ingredients.categoryWillAssign: Category will be assigned on save
ingredients.enterNameForCategory: Enter a name to detect the category

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters

recipes.title: Recipe suggestions
recipes.subtitle: Match recipes from the catalog against your pantry ingredients.

toast.successNoDeduction: Cooked! Nothing was deducted from your pantry.
toast.failed: Couldn't mark this recipe as cooked

nutrition.title: Nutrition
nutrition.approx: Approximate values — nutrition data is incomplete.

recipes.generateDesc: Choose pantry ingredients to include, optionally filter by selected catalog recipes, then generate ranked matches with quantity checks.
recipes.filteringSelected: Filtering suggestions to {{count}} selected catalog recipe(s).
recipes.catalogDesc: Search, filter by category, and select recipes to narrow suggestion generation.
recipes.noRecipes: No recipes match your search or category filter.
recipes.foundAiProposals: AI Chef proposed {{count}} creative recipe idea(s)

aiProposal.title: AI recipe ideas
aiProposal.desc: Creative recipes proposed by AI from your pantry ingredients.
aiProposal.subtitle: AI-generated idea from your pantry

recipes.pantryHint: Leave none selected to use your full pantry. Select specific items to narrow matching.
recipes.pantryEmpty: Your pantry is empty. Add ingredients first to generate suggestions.

suggestion.canPrepare: You have enough of every required ingredient

history.title: Suggestion history
history.subtitle: Review previously generated recipe suggestions for a selected period.

preferences.title: Taste profile
preferences.subtitle: Tell us what you love, what to avoid, and any dietary needs. We'll personalize your daily suggestions.
preferences.preferredIngredientsHint: Add ingredients you'd love to cook with more often.
preferences.dislikedIngredientsHint: We'll steer suggestions away from these.
preferences.ingredientPlaceholder: Type an ingredient and press Enter…
preferences.preferredCategoriesHint: Pick the kinds of dishes you enjoy most.
preferences.allergensHint: We'll flag and avoid recipes containing these.

recipeImports.title: Submit a recipe
recipeImports.subtitle: Upload a recipe and our team will review it before it joins the catalog.
recipeImports.acceptedTypesHint: Upload a recipe file (e.g. JSON or CSV). PDFs and photos are coming soon.
recipeImports.emptyDesc: Upload a recipe file above to send it for review.
